inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 free cash flow NZD 26.5m / 328.216m weighted average shares (Annual Report Note 14, investor presentation)
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 filing-based owner cash; wealth-tech amortisation bubble may lift FCF faster than net profit per management commentary

bear.notes: Capital-raising drought; derivatives ramp delayed; multiple compression

base.notes: Funds + wealth-tech growth offsets flat exchange tolls; FY2026 EBITDA guidance NZD 53-58.5m

bull.notes: Listing recovery + equity derivatives + KiwiSaver structural tailwind

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Goodwill and software intangibles on balance sheet; negative net tangible assets is accounting classification not hidden land

option_scan.question: In-business option not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Equity derivatives launched April 2026; revenue in Secondary Markets segment growth assumption

option_scan.question: Corporate action affecting run-rate?
option_scan.evidence: QuayStreet investment management externalised Feb 2026; FUM fees net of fund costs per Q1 2026 metrics

option_scan.question: Material standalone options after scan?
option_scan.evidence: Derivatives and platform migrations embedded in operating segments; no separate NAV overlay

growth_explanation.mechanism: Structural KiwiSaver and wealth-platform FUM growth plus new equity derivatives; partially offset by cyclical NZ capital-markets issuance and trading volumes.
growth_explanation.source: FY2025 annual report; Q1 2026 operating revenue release

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative
